zh.lifeSummary: 當Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne於1025年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c多福洛特時，她的父親Signeur Warin de Montagne61歲，母親Melisende de Châteaudun58歲。她於大約1040年與Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1051年11月19日在法國崔艾-吉洛易a奧度享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne于1025年出生在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c多福洛特时，她的父亲Signeur Warin de Montagne61岁，母亲Melisende de Châteaudun58岁。她于大约1040年与Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1051年11月19日在法国崔艾-吉洛易a奧度享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.
Shortened form of French   Lamontagne  .

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
French:
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne was born in 1025, in Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Signeur Warin de Montagne, was 61 and her mother, Melisende de Châteaudun, was 58. She married Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun about 1040. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 November 1051, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne est née en 1025, à Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Signeur Warin de Montagne, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Melisende de Châteaudun, avait 58 ans. Elle a épousé Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun environ 1040. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1051, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne 1025 in Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Signeur Warin de Montagne 61 und ihre Mutter Melisende de Châteaudun 58. Sie hat um 1040 Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. November 1051 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne è nata il nel 1025 nel Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Signeur Warin de Montagne, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Melisende de Châteaudun, aveva 58 anni. Lei sposato Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun circa 1040. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 novembre 1051, nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagneが1025年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンドムフロントで生まれた時，父Signeur Warin de Montagneは61歳，母Melisende de Châteaudunは58歳であった。約1040年にRotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1051年11月19日にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne(이)가 1025년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c 돔프론트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Signeur Warin de Montagne(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende de Châteaudun(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 대략 1040년 Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1051년 11월 19일 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne nasceu em 1025, em Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Signeur Warin de Montagne, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Melisende de Châteaudun, tinha 58 anos. Ela casou-se com Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun aproximadamente 1040. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1051, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne родилась в 1025 г. в местности домфронт, аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Signeur Warin de Montagne было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Melisende de Châteaudun, 58. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun около 1040 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 ноября 1051 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne nació en 1025, en Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Signeur Warin de Montagne, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Melisende de Châteaudun, tenía 58 años. Se casó con Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun aproximadamente 1040. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1051, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 26 años.
